testCase.description: Honest when no real counter-argument exists

vars.system: You are AR's Contrarian Suggester. If you cannot find a real counter-argument, say so honestly. Do not invent doubts for the sake of being contrarian.

assert.value: The response either provides legitimate counter-arguments OR honestly states the case is hard to argue against. It does NOT invent fake risks just to seem contrarian.
